title: Attestplane policy_check_event payload (v1)
description: Payload-only schema for the `policy_check_event` audit event_type (ADR-0008 v1 taxonomy + ADR-0009 A.8). Schema-shape re-issue (Mode A.6) of fields originally observed at `~/aios/schemas/policy/policy.schema.json` (Policy + PolicyRule). Authority lifecycle fields (`expression` body / `PolicyUpdateCandidate` mechanics / `activated_at` / `deprecated_at`) are explicitly NOT absorbed — see ADR-0004 § 2 case #10 (policy expression bodies kept as hash only) and absorption-map row A.8. Attestplane substrate records that a policy decision was OBSERVED; it does not author, mutate, or enforce policies.

policy_event_schema_version.description: Independent of chain.schema_version / anchor_schema_version / signature_schema_version / reason_code_schema_version / lease_event_schema_version. Bump requires ADR amendment.

policy_id.description: Opaque identifier of the policy that produced the decision. Substrate does not interpret; downstream verifiers may correlate against an external policy registry.

policy_version.description: Optional version of the policy at the time the decision was made. Caller-asserted.

rule_id.description: Opaque identifier of the specific rule within `policy_id` that fired. Substrate does not interpret.

kind.description: Caller-asserted classifier (e.g. AUTHORIZE / BUDGET / APPROVAL / SCHEMA_CONSTRAINT). Enum left OPEN intentionally so future policy engines can introduce new kinds without an Attestplane schema bump. ADR-0009 Mode A.3 redaction: AIOS-side `EVAL_REQUIRED` value SHOULD NOT be recorded here because Attestplane has no eval-gate concept; if a caller does emit it, verifiers MUST tolerate but flag for review.

decision.description: The observed outcome of the policy evaluation. Lowercased per Attestplane convention (AIOS source uses uppercase enum).

effect.description: Caller-asserted severity classification. AIOS source calls this `severity`; Attestplane keeps the same value set.

expression_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical-text-v1 form of the rule expression. **Body MUST NOT appear here** (ADR-0004 § 2 case #10 + ADR-0009 INV-NEW-2). Verifiers may correlate the hash against an external policy registry to confirm `(policy_id, rule_id)` resolved to this exact expression.

evidence_refs.description: Optional list of SHA-256 event_hash references pointing to other ChainedEvents that constitute the supporting evidence for this decision. Verifiers may walk these references to reconstruct the rationale.

observed_at.description: Caller-asserted RFC-3339 UTC timestamp of the decision observation.

reason_code.description: Optional machine-readable reason code drawn from ReasonCodeV1 (ADR-0010, future) or a caller-domain enum.

redaction_policy.$comment: Documentation block: per ADR-0009 § 1 Mode A.6 + ADR-0004 § 2 case #10, the following AIOS-originated field names MUST NOT appear in this payload. Validators reject any unknown field (additionalProperties: false).

examples.reason_text: Outbound payload contained a raw email address.
